opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every joint in my body is throbbing, my face is burning up, and I am too exhausted to even get out of bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It all blew up over the last day after I was out in the sun yesterday — the joint pain and the rash on my face are unbearable and I can't look after myself.

symptom_narrative.onset: escalated hard over the last 24 hours; started the day after I spent a short time out in the sun
symptom_narrative.duration: about a day of it being this severe
symptom_narrative.character: deep throbbing aching in the joints and a hot burning feeling across my face
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has been — I can barely move and I feel wiped out, like my whole system has shut down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both wrists, my knuckles, both knees and the small joints of my hands, all symmetrical; and a red rash across both cheeks and the bridge of my nose
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since yesterday, worse when I try to move
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; I took paracetamol and it did nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving my joints, and being in any light — I've had to keep the room completely dark
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling feverish, and totally drained of energy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I was diagnosed with lupus not long ago and I've had flares before, but nothing this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed tonight, I can't get to the kitchen or make food because my hands hurt too much

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; tonight cannot safely get to the kitchen or prepare food because of the hand and joint pain

objective_data_offered.value: 37.4 C on a home thermometer, and I feel feverish
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: a bright red, slightly raised rash across both my cheeks and over the bridge of my nose that feels like it's burning
my wrists, knuckles and both knees look and feel swollen, puffy and tender on both sides
